name: Crispy Wontons
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup Chopped Green Onions and Tops
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine pork, water chestnuts, green onions, soy sauce, salt, cornstarch, and ginger in a medium bowl; mix well.
2. Place 1/2 teaspoon of pork mixture in the center of each wonton skin.
3. Fold wonton skin over the filling to form a triangle.
4. Turn the top of the triangle down to meet the fold.
5. Turn over and moisten one corner with water.
6. Overlap the opposite corner over the moistened corner; press firmly.
7. Heat oil in a wok or large saucepan over medium-high heat to 375°F (190°C).
8. Deep fry wontons, a few at a time, for 2 to 3 minutes, or until golden brown and crispy.
9. Drain on paper towels.
10. Serve warm with catsup and hot mustard or sweet & sour sauce, as desired.
